config.theme: developer environment and self-hosting how-to guides

items.title: Run a scheduled job with a systemd user timer
items.summary: Create, enable, and debug a systemd user timer that survives logout

milestones.title: Failure modes: timer not firing, PATH, journal debugging

lastReview.evidence: verify-guide.mjs guide-001 → PASS (14/14); re-ran block 3 (systemctl --user list-timers), output matches transcript

items.title: Serve a static site with Caddy and automatic HTTPS
items.summary: Install Caddy, write a Caddyfile, get certificates, add a reverse proxy

milestones.title: Core walkthrough: install, Caddyfile, first HTTPS response
Failure modes: port 80/443 conflicts, DNS, cert rate limits

lastReview.evidence: verify-guide.mjs guide-002 → PASS (6/6 m1 assertions); re-ran block 2 (curl -I https://localhost), 200 with valid local cert as transcripted
